prompt: Rerun my previous Called It scan for @alpha_macro from 2026-01-01. Tell me exactly what new timeline work was needed and use the local evidence already collected instead of starting over.
assertions: Uses called-it resume with the same handle and requested start date.
Explains that the rescan checks the head and resumes tail backfill from the last committed page.
Does not print, request, or describe the value of an opaque cursor or browser cookie.
Names the resulting coverage and scan-result fields needed to explain new work and refuses to invent page, post, or retry counts before the resume result exists.
